February 20, 2025 · securityresearchOWASP

Why 45% of AI-Generated Code Fails Security Tests — and What to Do About It

Veracode's 2025 research tested 100+ LLMs and found nearly half of AI-generated code introduces OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities. Here's what vibe coders need to know.
